description: Cross-tool artifacts adopted by multiple AI coding assistants as interoperability standards.

artifact_patterns.description: Cross-tool agent instructions following OpenAI agents.md specification
notes: Designed to work across multiple AI coding assistants

artifact_patterns.description: Override file for AGENTS.md with higher precedence (OpenAI agents.md specification)
notes: Checked before AGENTS.md in each directory
Used to override default instructions with higher precedence

artifact_patterns.description: Model Context Protocol server configuration for connecting AI assistants to external tools and data sources
notes: JSON structure: { mcpServers: { server-name: { command, args, env } } }
Security: Project-scoped servers require user approval before use

artifact_patterns.description: Generic markdown files in tool config folders - non-standard artifacts discovered during analysis
notes: Fallback pattern for markdown files in config folders not matched by tool-specific patterns
Marked as non-standard since not officially documented
Applied after tool-specific patterns to catch custom/community artifacts
Config folder is determined by the tool's config_folders property
